text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: The heck? Everyone looks so serious...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Argh, dang it. I'm startin' to get antsy... Take
deep breaths... Keep on keepin' it cool!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Hishiamaaa! Show them what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Hishiama! We're cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you guys! You made the time to come see me
race?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Can't go losin' when I've got so many adoring
eyes watching over me and cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon suddenly raises her hands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a clap to the cheeks, she gets her game face
on!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this! Give me your best shot, 'cause I'm
ready to take you all on!
